resources.string: Pull down from the right or left side of the status bar to expand quick settings
This Xposed Module is made by YukiHookAPI. \nLearn more https://github.com/HighCapable/YuKiHookAPI
This Xposed Module is powered by KavaRef.\nLearn more https://github.com/HighCapable/KavaRef
Choose which side of the status bar will fully expand quick settings when pulling down
